creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 224957
patch to facilitate using a more conventional LICENSE setup

I'm skeptical. It removes all the license restrictions from the
kde-icons-* ports. The license permissions currently say that we
cannot redistribute the distfiles, packages, etc. Is all of that
no longer the case?

Note that I fixed the kde-icons-nuovext2 fallout in 9367fd9f7092c4bdfa22c6877cba54a30a2214e1
